content:
🚀 crosspaste-desktop | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To synchronize clipboard content across different devices (computers) on a local network or via direct connection, allowing users to copy something on one device and paste it on another without manual transfer.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time Sharing • Unified Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux) • Rich Type Support (Text, Color, URL, HTML, RTF, Image, File) • End-to-End Encryption • LAN-only Serverless Architecture
📖 Summary: CrossPaste Desktop is a cross-platform application that enables seamless clipboard sharing across multiple devices. It supports various data types and ensures privacy with end-to-end encryption and a serverless, LAN-only architecture.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
